The '''Sirpar Hills''' were the terraced hillsides surrounding the [[Anaxes Citadel]] in [[Pols Anaxes]], on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Anaxes/Legends|Anaxes]]. These were covered with the estates of wealthy families who had rich naval backgrounds, in the [[Azure Imperium]], the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Old Republic]], and the [[New Order/Legends|New Order]]. As with the capital, most vehicles were banned in the Sirpar Hills, so residents would switch out their vehicles for [[Keffi/Legends|Keffis]] at the nearby [[Sirpar Station]]. The [[Holt family]] made their home in the hills.
